CreateForm.description: Grants permission to submit an Activate application form

GetAccountContact.description: Grants permission to get the AWS account contact information

GetContentInfo.description: Grants permission to get Activate tech posts and offer information

GetCosts.description: Grants permission to get the AWS cost information

GetCredits.description: Grants permission to get the AWS credit information

GetMemberInfo.description: Grants permission to get the Activate member information

GetProgram.description: Grants permission to get an Activate program

PutMemberInfo.description: Grants permission to create or update the Activate member information
